privileged_info_summary: The input file contact_blocks.FCStd is real geometry derived from FreeCAD's official FEM test suite (constraint_contact_solid_solid.FCStd). It contains two Part::Box objects named TopBox and BottomBox in contact with each other. The task requires fusing these two blocks into a single solid using a Boolean Union and saving the result to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/fused_model.FCStd. There are no explicit metadata claims provided in the task definition.
